description_for_human: Search vendors, optimise cross-vendor software deals, and run human-approved, simulated checkout.

functions.name: registerVendor
functions.description: Register a new software vendor and its products so they can participate in deals.

functions.name: searchProducts
functions.description: Search products across every registered vendor by keywords or capability.

functions.name: optimizeDeal
functions.description: Assemble the cheapest cross-vendor set of products that covers the required capabilities, applying marketing/co-sell/volume incentives, and return a priced quote with savings.

functions.name: checkoutDeal
functions.description: Place a human-approved, idempotent, DRY_RUN order for a previously optimised quote. Requires an approval token.

conversation_starters.text: We need a secure creative + productivity stack for 200 people — what should we buy across vendors?
